_meta.title: Create Item Persistence — State Consistency
_meta.dependency: J3 must PASS — new item id=4 used for verification

_observed: HTTP 200. Response now shows total=4, up from total=3 captured in J2 (delta = +1, exactly as expected). The newly created item (id=4, name='Validation Widget', description='Created by pipeline', in_stock=true) appears as the 4th entry in the items array. All four fields match exactly what was submitted in J3. State persistence across requests confirmed — in-memory store retained the create.
